payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Ceiling-mounted fan with a lit frosted glass globe light and five dark brown/bronze blades; metal motor housing visible; blades extend toward image edges and are partially cropped at the left, indicating an edge-cropped view; appears mid-size (roughly 1.0–1.2 m diameter) and about 2.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"fan","short_description":"dark brown-blade ceiling fan, lit","long_description":"Ceiling-mounted fan with a lit frosted glass globe light and five dark brown/bronze blades; metal motor housing visible; blades extend toward image edges and are partially cropped at the left, indicating an edge-cropped view; appears mid-size (roughly 1.0–1.2 m diameter) and about 2.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["frosted glass globe (lit)","dark brown/bronze blades","five blades","metal motor housing","edge-cropped/partial","ceiling-mounted","mid-size (~1.0–1.2 m)","slightly blurred/compressed"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
